name: agent-skills
description: 5 production-grade capability skills for AI agents: Cloudflare DNS migration + zone hardening, Namecheap DNS via XML API, Fly.io → AWS migration (7 phases, ≤9 min downtime), monid 8-source deep research, and terminal-poster retro-cyberpunk image generation (Nano Banana Pro). Capability skills, not SDLC steps. The autonomous Orca fleets moved to ravidsrk/orca-fleet. MIT.
